pr-evidence/strict-pr-evidence-validatio.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 reviewer reported no findings and approved the strict PR evidence validation-summary skip slice.
verification: poetry run python -m compileall -q src tests
what_changed: Skipped only clean closed-schema PR evidence validation summaries during directory validation
Reported raw or debug-augmented PR evidence validation summaries as invalid sidecars
pr-evidence/strict-pr-evidence-validatio.why: Keep recursive PR traceability checks from silently ignoring malformed validation summaries that carry ad hoc debug payloads.
